name: Houston's Canadian Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a Dutch oven.
2. Add the carrots, celery, and onions all at once and sauté until soft but not brown.
3. Stir in flour and cook until the mixture begins to turn a light-brown color.
4. Gradually add the chicken broth over medium-high heat, stirring constantly with a whisk.
5. Continue cooking until a thick base forms.
6. Slowly add the half-and-half, being careful not to let it boil.
7. Stir in the Velveeta cheese until melted.
8. Just before serving, stir in the chopped parsley.
9. Garnish with diced tomatoes and jalapeno chilies if desired.
